title: Lily and the Magic Pencil
synopsis: When Lily finds a magical pencil at school, her drawings come to life! But when her dragon drawing escapes and causes chaos in the classroom, Lily must learn to use her new power responsibly with help from her diverse group of friends.

pages.text: Lily loved to draw. She drew cats and dogs. She drew trees and flowers. She drew everything! At school, Lily always sat next to her friends Maya and Carlos. Maya had pretty brown skin and curly hair. Carlos wore glasses and loved to laugh.

illustration.description: A bright classroom scene with Lily, a girl with blonde pigtails, sitting at a colorful desk between Maya, a Black girl with beautiful curls, and Carlos, a Latino boy with glasses. They're all drawing with crayons on paper. Sunlight streams through windows, and there are children's artwork on the walls.
illustration.alt: Lily and her diverse friends drawing together in their cheerful classroom

pages.text: One day, Lily found something special. Under her desk was a golden pencil! It sparkled like stars. It felt warm in her hand. "Wow!" said Lily. "Look at this pretty pencil!" Maya and Carlos looked. "It's so shiny!" said Maya. "Where did it come from?" asked Carlos.

illustration.description: Close-up of Lily's amazed face with big sparkling eyes as she holds up a magical golden pencil that glows with tiny stars around it. Maya and Carlos lean in with curious expressions, their eyes wide with wonder. The pencil radiates warm golden light.
illustration.alt: Lily holding a magical glowing golden pencil while her friends look on in wonder

pages.text: Lily did not know where the pencil came from. But she wanted to try it! She drew a little butterfly on her paper. The butterfly was purple and blue. It had pretty wings. "There!" said Lily. "My first drawing with the magic pencil!"

illustration.description: Lily concentrating as she draws with the golden pencil, her tongue sticking out slightly in focus. On the paper is a beautiful purple and blue butterfly. The classroom background shows other diverse children working, including a girl with hijab and an Asian boy with spiky hair.
illustration.alt: Lily drawing a colorful butterfly with her new golden pencil

pages.text: Suddenly, something amazing happened! The butterfly began to move. It flapped its wings on the paper! Then it flew right off the page! "Oh my!" cried Lily. The purple and blue butterfly flew around the room. Maya gasped. Carlos dropped his crayon.

illustration.description: The magical butterfly with shimmering purple and blue wings flies through the air above the shocked children's heads. Lily looks amazed with her mouth open, Maya covers her mouth in surprise, and Carlos has dropped his crayon. Other diverse classmates in the background point up at the butterfly in wonder.
illustration.alt: A magical butterfly flying above surprised children in the classroom

pages.text: "Your pencil is magic!" whispered Maya. "This is so cool!" said Carlos. "Can you draw more things?" Lily smiled big. She felt excited. What should she draw next? Maybe a flower? Or a bird? Or something bigger? "I know!" said Lily. "I'll draw a dragon!"

illustration.description: Lily grinning with excitement while holding the golden pencil up in the air. Maya claps her hands together with joy, and Carlos adjusts his glasses with a huge smile. The butterfly can be seen fluttering near the window. The mood is bright and full of anticipation.
illustration.alt: Lily and her friends excited about the magic pencil's power

pages.text: Lily drew a small dragon. It was green and friendly. It had tiny wings and a long tail. But when the dragon came to life, it was not small anymore! The dragon was big! It was very big! "ROAR!" said the dragon. It knocked over books. It made a big mess!

illustration.description: A large, friendly-looking green dragon with big cartoon eyes fills most of the classroom, accidentally knocking over books and papers with its tail. The dragon looks confused and sorry. Children scatter with surprised but not scared expressions, including diverse students of different ethnicities looking amazed.
illustration.alt: A big green dragon accidentally making a mess in the crowded classroom

pages.text: "Help!" called their teacher, Mrs. Kim. Mrs. Kim had short black hair and kind eyes. But now she looked very surprised! Other kids in the class started to laugh. Zara, who wore a colorful hijab, giggled. Sam, a boy with red hair and freckles, clapped his hands. "A real dragon!" they all shouted.

illustration.description: Mrs. Kim, an Asian woman with short black hair and glasses, stands with her hands up in surprise but smiling. Around the classroom, diverse children react with delight - Zara in a bright patterned hijab is laughing, Sam with red hair and freckles points excitedly, and other children of various backgrounds cheer.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Kim and the diverse class of children reacting to the dragon with surprise and joy

pages.text: The dragon was friendly, but it was too big for the room! It tried to sit down but bumped the art table. Paint spilled everywhere! Red, yellow, and blue paint covered the floor. "Oops!" the dragon seemed to say. "Sorry!" Lily knew she had to do something fast!

illustration.description: The green dragon sitting awkwardly with paint splatters of red, yellow, and blue all around its feet and on the floor. The dragon has an apologetic expression with big sad eyes. Paint drips from the overturned art table, creating a colorful but messy rainbow on the floor.
illustration.alt: The apologetic dragon surrounded by spilled rainbow paint in the art area

pages.text: "I need to fix this!" said Lily. She thought hard. How could she make the dragon go away? Maya had an idea. "Can you draw the dragon back on the paper?" she asked. Carlos nodded. "Yes! Draw it small again!" Lily looked at her magic pencil. Would it work?

illustration.description: Lily looking thoughtful with her finger on her chin while holding the golden pencil. Maya points enthusiastically with an excited expression, and Carlos nods eagerly with his hands gesturing. The big dragon sits patiently in the background, and other classmates gather around with hopeful faces.
illustration.alt: Lily thinking while Maya and Carlos offer helpful suggestions about the dragon

pages.text: Lily tried to draw the dragon back on paper. She drew very carefully. The big dragon began to shrink! It got smaller and smaller. Soon it was tiny again! The little dragon walked back onto the paper. It curled up and went to sleep. "It worked!" cheered everyone.

illustration.description: A magical transformation scene showing the dragon getting smaller with sparkles around it as it shrinks back onto Lily's paper. The dragon now looks tiny and peaceful, curled up sleeping on the drawing. All the children cheer with their arms raised, showing joy and relief.
illustration.alt: The dragon magically shrinking back onto Lily's paper while children celebrate

pages.text: Mrs. Kim smiled at Lily. "That was quite an adventure!" she said. "But next time, maybe draw something smaller first?" Lily laughed. "I will!" she promised. Maya and Carlos hugged her. All the kids helped clean up the paint. Even though it was messy, everyone had fun.

illustration.description: A heartwarming scene of Mrs. Kim smiling warmly at Lily while the diverse group of children work together cleaning up the colorful paint with paper towels and mops. Everyone is smiling and helping each other, creating a sense of community and friendship in the bright classroom.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Kim and the children happily cleaning up together after their magical adventure

pages.text: Lily kept the magic pencil safe in her desk. She would use it again, but more carefully next time. Maybe she would draw tiny flowers. Or small birds. Or little fish. "This is the best day ever!" said Lily. And all her friends agreed. Magic made everything more fun!

illustration.description: Lily carefully placing the golden pencil in her desk drawer while daydreaming about small magical creatures - tiny flowers, birds, and fish float in thought bubbles above her head. Maya, Carlos, and their other diverse friends gather around her desk, all smiling with anticipation for future magical adventures.
illustration.alt: Lily safely storing her magic pencil while imagining future small magical drawings with her friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Lily find under her desk?
questions.explanation: Lily found a golden pencil under her desk that turned out to be magical!

questions.question: What was the first thing Lily drew with the magic pencil?
questions.explanation: Lily first drew a purple and blue butterfly that came to life and flew around the room.

questions.question: What problem did the dragon cause?
choices: It was too big and knocked things over
questions.explanation: The dragon became too big for the classroom and accidentally knocked over books and spilled paint everywhere.

questions.question: Who helped Lily solve the dragon problem?
questions.explanation: Maya and Carlos gave Lily the idea to draw the dragon small again on the paper to make it shrink back.

questions.question: What did Lily learn about using the magic pencil?
choices: To be more careful and draw smaller things
questions.explanation: Lily learned to be more careful with the magic pencil and decided to draw smaller things next time.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.instructions: Choose the best word to complete each sentence from the story.

sentences.text: Lily found a _____ pencil under her desk.
The _____ came to life and flew around the room.
The dragon spilled _____ all over the floor.

pages.title: Story Sequence
pages.instructions: Put these events in the right order by choosing the correct word.

sentences.text: _____, she drew a dragon that became too big.
_____, her friends helped her make the dragon small again.
